params.seatCollection: The NFT collection acting as the royalty seat (0 => use defaultRoyaltyCollection).
params.seatTokenId: The tokenId within the seat collection that the caller owns.

params.seatCollection: The NFT collection acting as the royalty seat (0 => use defaultRoyaltyCollection).
params.seatTokenId: The tokenId within the seat collection that the caller owns.

params.defaultInputToken_: Default ERC20 token used for recipes (typically NGT).
params.feeRouter_: Address that receives or routes protocol fees.
params.feeToken_: Token used for protocol fees (may match input token or differ, e.g., APE).
params.maxBatchSize_: Maximum allowed batch size for crafting.
params.positionsToken_: Address of the ForgePosition721 contract that will mint position NFTs.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

positionTokenURI(uint256).details: Can be called by ForgePosition721.tokenURI() or external viewers.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

royaltyReceiverForPosition(uint256).details: If no royalty seat is recorded, falls back to the recipe's forgeCreator.

setDefaultRoyaltyCollection(address).details: For V1 this should be set to the NPC collection.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateRecipe(uint256,(uint8,address,uint.details: Conservative update: core economics cannot change after creation to protect existing positions.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

allowedRoyaltyCollections(address).notice: Collections allowed to act as royalty seats (NPCs now, optional Forge NFTs later).

craft(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Craft a single position from a recipe.

craftBatch(uint256,uint256,address,uint2.notice: Craft multiple positions of the same recipe in a single transaction.

defaultInputErc20().notice: Default ERC20 typed helper for defaultInputToken (typically NGT).

defaultInputToken().notice: Default ERC20 address used when a recipe's inputToken is zero (typically NGT).

defaultRoyaltyCollection().notice: Default royalty collection used when caller does not explicitly specify one.

destroy(uint256).notice: Destroy a position and redeem underlying input tokens.

feeRouter().notice: Address that receives or routes protocol fees.

feeToken().notice: ERC20 used for protocol fees (may match inputToken or differ, e.g., APE).

forgeName(address).notice: Optional human-readable names for creator forges.

maxBatchSize().notice: Maximum allowed batch size for craftBatch.

nextRecipeId().notice: Next recipe id to use (starts at 0, first recipe is 1).

positionRoyaltySeat(uint256).notice: Royalty seat per Forge position (positionId => NFT collection + tokenId).

positionTokenURI(uint256).notice: Get tokenURI for a position, delegating to recipe's on-chain art if available.

positions(uint256).notice: Position metadata keyed by ForgePosition721 tokenId.

positionsToken().notice: Address of the ForgePosition721 contract used for position ownership.

royaltyReceiverForPosition(uint256).notice: Returns the address that should receive royalties for a given position.

setDefaultRoyaltyCollection(address).notice: Set the default royalty collection used when caller does not explicitly specify one.

setRoyaltyCollection(address,bool).notice: Allow or disallow a collection to act as a royalty seat.

totalInputByRecipe(uint256).notice: Aggregate input locked per recipe id.

totalInputLocked().notice: Total amount of input tokens locked across all positions.

totalPositionsByRecipe(uint256).notice: Aggregate positions created per recipe id.

userActivePositions(address).notice: Number of active positions per user.
